testcase.name: runScenario["Successful login with valid credentials", "SauceDemo Login Functionality"](1)
testcase.system-out:
06:20:21.141 [main] INFO com.syafiq.cucumber.TestRunner -- Suite setup: initializing WebDriver (chrome) 06:20:23.043 [main] INFO com.syafiq.cucumber.TestRunner -- WebDriver initialized

testcase.name: runScenario["Login failure with incorrect credentials", "SauceDemo Login Functionality"](2)
testcase.system-out: &amp#27;[1mScenario:&amp#27;[22m Login failure with incorrect credentials &amp#27;[90m# src/main/resources/features/Login.feature:9&amp#27;[39m 06:20:25.044 [main] INFO com.syafiq.cucumber.SortAndCheckoutTest -- Page objects initialized 06:20:25.045 [main] INFO com.syafiq.cucumber.LoginTest -- Navigating to login page (clearing browser state) 06:20:26.111 [main] INFO com.syafiq.cucumber.LoginTest -- Login page is ready &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mGiven &amp#27;[22mthe user is on the login page&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.syafiq.cucumber.LoginTest.user_is_on_login_page()&amp#27;[39m 06:20:26.112 [main] INFO com.syafiq.cucumber.LoginTest -- User enters invalid username and password &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mthe user enters invalid username and password&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.syafiq.cucumber.LoginTest.user_enters_invalid_username_and_password()&amp#27;[39m 06:20:26.112 [main] INFO com.syafiq.cucumber.LoginTest -- User clicks on login button &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mclicks the login button&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.syafiq.cucumber.LoginTest.clicks_on_login_button()&amp#27;[39m 06:20:26.146 [main] INFO com.syafiq.cucumber.LoginTest -- User sees error message &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mthe user should see an error message&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.syafiq.cucumber.LoginTest.user_should_see_error_message()&amp#27;[39m

testcase.name: runScenario["Sort products by price low to high", "Sort Products by Price and Checkout"](3)
testcase.system-out: &amp#27;[1mScenario:&amp#27;[22m Sort products by price low to high &amp#27;[90m# src/main/resources/features/SortAndCheckout.feature:12&amp#27;[39m 06:20:26.148 [main] INFO inventory page&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.syafiq.cucumber.LoginTest.user_should_be_redirected_to_inventory_page()&amp#27;[39m 06:20:27.372 [main] INFO com.syafiq.cucumber.SortAndCheckoutTest -- Sorting products by price: low to high &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mthe user sorts products by price low to high&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.syafiq.cucumber.SortAndCheckoutTest.user_sorts_by_price_low_to_high()&amp#27;[39m 06:20:27.433 [main] INFO com.syafiq.cucumber.SortAndCheckoutTest -- Verifying products are sorted by price ascending 06:20:27.633 [main] INFO com.syafiq.cucumber.SortAndCheckoutTest -- Products are correctly sorted by price ascending. Cheapest: Sauce Labs Onesie at $7.99 &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mthe products should be sorted from cheapest to most expensive&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.syafiq.cucumber.SortAndCheckoutTest.products_sorted_cheapest_to_most_expensive()&amp#27;[39m

testcase.name: runScenario["Successfully checkout the cheapest product", "Sort Products by Price and Checkout"](4)
testcase.system-out: &amp#27;[1mScenario:&amp#27;[22m Successfully checkout the cheapest product &amp#27;[90m# src/main/resources/features/SortAndCheckout.feature:16&amp#27;[39m 06:20:27.636 [main] Onesie at $7.99 06:20:29.050 [main] INFO com.syafiq.cucumber.SortAndCheckoutTest -- Product added to cart successfully &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mthe user adds the cheapest product to cart&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.syafiq.cucumber.SortAndCheckoutTest.user_adds_cheapest_product_to_cart()&amp#27;[39m 06:20:29.051 [main] INFO com.syafiq.cucumber.SortAndCheckoutTest -- Clicking cart icon to navigate to cart page &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mthe user navigates to the cart&amp#27;[39m 06:20:29.115 [main] INFO com.syafiq.cucumber.SortAndCheckoutTest -- Cart page displayed. Item count: 1 &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mthe cart page should be displayed&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.syafiq.cucumber.SortAndCheckoutTest.cart_page_should_be_displayed()&amp#27;[39m 06:20:29.115 [main] INFO com.syafiq.cucumber.SortAndCheckoutTest -- Clicking checkout button &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mthe user clicks the checkout button&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.syafiq.cucumber.SortAndCheckoutTest.user_clicks_checkout_button()&amp#27;[39m 06:20:29.167 [main] INFO com.syafiq.cucumber.SortAndCheckoutTest -- Filling checkout info — firstName: 'John', lastName: 'Doe', postalCode: '12345' &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mthe user fills checkout info with first name &amp#27;[1m"John"&amp#27;[22m last name &amp#27;[1m"Doe"&amp#27;[22m postal code &amp#27;[1m"12345"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.syafiq.cucumber.SortAndCheckoutTest.user_fills_checkout_info(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m 06:20:29.266 [main] INFO com.syafiq.cucumber.SortAndCheckoutTest -- Clicking continue button &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mthe user clicks the continue button&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.syafiq.cucumber.SortAndCheckoutTest.user_clicks_continue_button()&amp#27;[39m 06:20:29.328 [main] INFO com.syafiq.cucumber.SortAndCheckoutTest -- Verifying order overview page is displayed 06:20:29.353 [main] INFO com.syafiq.cucumber.SortAndCheckoutTest -- Order overview displayed. Total: Total: $8.63 &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mthe order overview page should be displayed&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.syafiq.cucumber.SortAndCheckoutTest.order_overview_page_should_be_displayed()&amp#27;[39m 06:20:29.353 [main] INFO com.syafiq.cucumber.SortAndCheckoutTest -- Clicking finish button to complete the order &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mthe user clicks the finish button&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.syafiq.cucumber.SortAndCheckoutTest.user_clicks_finish_button()&amp#27;[39m 06:20:29.407 [main] INFO com.syafiq.cucumber.SortAndCheckoutTest -- Verifying order confirmation — expected: 'Thank you for your order!', actual: 'Thank you for your order!' 06:20:29.420 [main] INFO com.syafiq.cucumber.SortAndCheckoutTest -- Order confirmed: Thank you for your order! — Your order has been dispatched, and will arrive just as fast as the pony can get there! &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mthe order confirmation should display &amp#27;[1m"Thank you for your order!"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.syafiq.cucumber.SortAndCheckoutTest.order_confirmation_should_display(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m

testcase.name: runScenario["Checkout fails when required field is empty", "Sort Products by Price and Checkout"](7)
testcase.system-out: &amp#27;[1mScenario Outline:&amp#27;[22m Checkout fails when required field is empty &amp#27;[90m# src/main/resources/features/SortAndCheckout.feature:41&amp#27;[39m 06:20:32.709
